description_long: This doll depicts an elderly figure dressed in an elaborate, historical-style outfit reminiscent of 18th-century European fashion. The doll features a powdered white wig with curls, round spectacles perched on its nose, and a detailed face with rosy cheeks and a pronounced nose. Its attire includes a dark blue, buttoned frock coat with white ruffled cuffs and a matching ruffled cravat, paired with a cream-colored skirt or breeches. The doll stands on a round, dark blue base, which provides stability and display support. The overall craftsmanship suggests a decorative or collectible purpose, with attention to period-accurate details in both clothing and facial features.
description: A finely detailed elderly doll in 18th-century attire, featuring a blue frock coat, white ruffles, spectacles, and a powdered wig, standing on a round base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, spectacles, ruffled cravat, and detailed coat buttons.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, wig curls, and layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, wig, and the base supporting the doll.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side of the face, spectacles, and the coat's sleeve details.
attribute_clothing_style: 18th-century European aristocratic style with a dark blue frock coat featuring decorative buttons and white ruffled cuffs, a white ruffled cravat, and a cream-colored skirt or breeches.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent and angled outward, head facing forward, legs together, and torso erect.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with slightly raised eyebrows, round open eyes, and a closed mouth with a subtle, gentle demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Short, curly, powdered white wig styled in 18th-century fashion with side curls and a voluminous top.
